name: Nashville Post Office
description_short: Nashville Main Office is a USPS post office location offering mailing services, PO boxes, passport services, and limited financial services including money orders.
description_long: Nashville Main Office is a United States Postal Service (USPS) location operated by the federal government, serving the Nashville, Tennessee area from its main facility at 525 Royal Parkway. As a government-run post office, it provides comprehensive postal and related services to residential and business customers throughout the region. The facility offers a broad range of USPS services including domestic and international mailing, PO box rentals, money order services, passport appointment scheduling and photo services, self-service kiosks, and bulk mail services. The location distinguishes itself through extended hours (open until 6 PM weekdays and Sundays, with limited Sunday morning service), 24-hour self-service kiosk access, and government-backed credibility and reliability. This is a standard post office with basic financial transaction capabilities limited to money order issuance, making it suitable for customers needing postal and government ID services rather than comprehensive financial services.
pros: Extended operating hours: 8 AM-6 PM weekdays, 9 AM-6 PM Saturday, 10 AM-6 PM Sunday
24-hour self-service kiosk access for basic services
Passport appointment scheduling and photo services available
Bulk mail acceptance for business customers
Multiple nearby locations (Hermitage, East Nashville, Donelson) for convenience
cons: No financial services available—does not offer check cashing, wire transfers, or bill payment despite categorization
Limited passport services—no walk-in service except Mon/Wed-Fri 10:30-11:30 AM
Mailing services listed as unavailable at this location despite being a post office
No pickup services available at this location
Business services extremely limited—no new business reply mail permits or business account balance checks
best_for: Customers needing to purchase money orders for bill payment or fund transfers
People applying for or renewing passports with advance appointment availability
PO box renters needing 24-hour mailbox access
Bulk mail senders and businesses handling large mailings
diagnosis: Nashville Main Office is a government post office suitable for customers needing money orders, PO boxes, passport services, and domestic/international mailing—not a financial services provider. The critical caveat is that despite its check-cashing categorization, the facility explicitly does not offer check cashing, wire transfers, or other advanced financial services, making it fundamentally misclassified in the current database.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
